title: SAFE Grilling Act
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
crs_summary: Strengthening Awareness and Funding Education for Grilling Act or SAFE Grilling Act This bill requires the Consumer Product Safety Commission to develop and implement a public awareness campaign about the dangers associated with cooking using a grill and best practices for using a grill safely to prevent injuries and fires.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Energy and Commerce.
